headline: BTIG Reiterates Buy on Booking Holdings, Maintains $6250 Price Target
summary: BTIG  analyst Jake Fuller   reiterates Booking Holdings (NASDAQ:BKNG) with a Buy and maintains $6250 price target.

headline: Booking CFO: The AI Threat Isn’t ‘Really a Risk at All’
summary: In the face of the LLM threat, Booking Holdings thinks it can repeatedly grow its top line 8% annually over the "medium term" and earnings per share 15% over the same timespan.
